channel.title: Discover - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: Trending content from your personal network

item.title: 【和陰少女】第九幕『赤沼村』 ーー昼過ぎ頃、紫乃たち一行は赤沼村に到着した。 村には大きな一本の大通りとその両端に藁…
item.author: けみ@小説/AIイラスト (@kemmy02.bsky.social)
item.description:
【和陰少女】第九幕『赤沼村』

ーー昼過ぎ頃、紫乃たち一行は赤沼村に到着した。

村には大きな一本の大通りとその両端に藁葺の民家や民宿が並んでいる。
山に入る手前の唯一の村のためか民宿の割合が目立つ。

少し先に見える十字路には笠屋や農具屋、魚屋など生活に必要最低限の店。
思ったより人通りは多くないが、よくある田舎の村。

「何がすぐじゃ！
　そこそこ歩いたぞ！
　お主の家はどこじゃ！」

「そこそこって、１時間も歩いてないじゃない。」

👇️つづき
note.com/kemmy_02/n/n...

#小説 #AIイラスト #AIart #和陰少女
item.content:encoded:
【和陰少女】第九幕『赤沼村』

ーー昼過ぎ頃、紫乃たち一行は赤沼村に到着した。

村には大きな一本の大通りとその両端に藁葺の民家や民宿が並んでいる。
山に入る手前の唯一の村のためか民宿の割合が目立つ。

少し先に見える十字路には笠屋や農具屋、魚屋など生活に必要最低限の店。
思ったより人通りは多くないが、よくある田舎の村。

「何がすぐじゃ！
　そこそこ歩いたぞ！
　お主の家はどこじゃ！」

「そこそこって、１時間も歩いてないじゃない。」

👇️つづき
note.com/kemmy_02/n/n...

#小説 #AIイラスト #AIart #和陰少女

item.title: Texas has decided public schools should teach Noah's Ark, th…
item.author: Hemant Mehta (@friendlyatheist.com)
item.description:
Texas has decided public schools should teach Noah's Ark, the Burning Bush, Adam & Eve, and more as required reading.

It's terrible news for religious freedom.

It's also terrible news for Christianity itself.

www.friendlyatheist.com/p/texas-just...
item.content:encoded:
Texas has decided public schools should teach Noah's Ark, the Burning Bush, Adam & Eve, and more as required reading.

It's terrible news for religious freedom.

It's also terrible news for Christianity itself.

www.friendlyatheist.com/p/texas-just...

item.title: そうだ、コテンラジオを聴いてて ディアブロが日本ではウケずに、アメリカでウケる理由がわかった気がしたんだった エターナ…
item.author: hann-solo (@hnsol.bsky.social)
item.description:
そうだ、コテンラジオを聴いてて
ディアブロが日本ではウケずに、アメリカでウケる理由がわかった気がしたんだった

エターナルバトルはリアルなんだよ
item.content:encoded:
そうだ、コテンラジオを聴いてて
ディアブロが日本ではウケずに、アメリカでウケる理由がわかった気がしたんだった

エターナルバトルはリアルなんだよ

item.title: Inside a women’s prison, a domestic violence victim began co…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
Inside a women’s prison, a domestic violence victim began collecting others’ stories of abuse. 156 women answered her call.

Together, they became “survivor sisters” — and helped shape a new law offering them a path toward freedom. But would it work?

Listen to the full episode:
item.content:encoded:
Inside a women’s prison, a domestic violence victim began collecting others’ stories of abuse. 156 women answered her call.

Together, they became “survivor sisters” — and helped shape a new law offering them a path toward freedom. But would it work?

Listen to the full episode:

item.title: ローリー・アンダーソンが 京都賞を受賞されたそうです おめでとうございます🍾 彼女が編纂した『ルー・リード 俺の太極…

item.description:

おめでとうございます🍾

彼女が編纂した『ルー・リード　俺の太極拳』(国書刊行会)も面白いですよ。
ご興味ある方はぜひ！

item.title: 世にも奇妙な〜を親子で見てて怖がってる次男に母ちゃん（わたしも怖がり）しっかりせなっと思っ出た「大丈夫！母ちゃんおしっこ…

item.description: 世にも奇妙な〜を親子で見てて怖がってる次男に母ちゃん（わたしも怖がり）しっかりせなっと思っ出た「大丈夫！母ちゃんおしっこしてくるから大丈夫やからな〜」に今わけわからんくてじわじわきてる

item.content:encoded: The UFC match plot: how a far-right group tried to assassinate Trump at his own event

item.title: A tree is not merely wood; it is a natural air conditioner, …
item.author: Petra Michaela (@petramichaela.bsky.social)
item.description: A tree is not merely wood; it is a natural air conditioner, a source of oxygen, a support for rainfall, and a sanctuary for birds. It is a safeguard for our future. When we cut down trees, we lose more than just greenery; we invite heat, drought, pollution, and suffering. 🌳 Save trees. Save lives.
item.content:encoded: A tree is not merely wood; it is a natural air conditioner, a source of oxygen, a support for rainfall, and a sanctuary for birds. It is a safeguard for our future. When we cut down trees, we lose more than just greenery; we invite heat, drought, pollution, and suffering. 🌳 Save trees. Save lives.

item.title: 🎉 Celebrating！ 🎉 (500+ new stars) 📦 hugohe3 / ppt-master…
item.author: GitHub Trending (@github-trending.bsky.social)
item.description:
🎉 Celebrating！ 🎉 (500+ new stars)

📦 hugohe3 / ppt-master
⭐ 32,649 (+589)
🗒 Python

AI generates a real, editable PowerPoint from any document — native shapes & animations, speaker notes voiced as audio narration, and the option to follow your own .pptx template, not slide images ·...
item.content:encoded:
🎉 Celebrating！ 🎉 (500+ new stars)

📦 hugohe3 / ppt-master
⭐ 32,649 (+589)
🗒 Python

AI generates a real, editable PowerPoint from any document — native shapes & animations, speaker notes voiced as audio narration, and the option to follow your own .pptx template, not slide images ·...

item.title: 新しい記事を書きました📝 「書いたら一声、あとは全SNSへ ── 記事宣伝を自動化する設計」 記事を書いたあとの「…
item.author: 胡田@Microsoft MVP(2014~)&MCT / Masahiko Ebisuda (@ebibibibibibi.bsky.social)
item.description:
新しい記事を書きました📝

「書いたら一声、あとは全SNSへ ── 記事宣伝を自動化する設計」

記事を書いたあとの「宣伝する」って地味に面倒で、結局それが原因で記事が埋もれていく…という課題を、Claude Codeのスキルで丸ごと自動化した話です。

「記事を宣伝して」の一声だけで、BlueSky・X・Discord・LinkedInへ自動配信。記事の指定も確認も不要。RSSで最新記事を拾って、内容を読んで、プラットフォームごとに文面を作り分けて投げる ── という5ステップ設計です。
item.content:encoded:
新しい記事を書きました📝

「書いたら一声、あとは全SNSへ ── 記事宣伝を自動化する設計」

記事を書いたあとの「宣伝する」って地味に面倒で、結局それが原因で記事が埋もれていく…という課題を、Claude Codeのスキルで丸ごと自動化した話です。

「記事を宣伝して」の一声だけで、BlueSky・X・Discord・LinkedInへ自動配信。記事の指定も確認も不要。RSSで最新記事を拾って、内容を読んで、プラットフォームごとに文面を作り分けて投げる ── という5ステップ設計です。

item.title: Meet the men who have had enough of hiding under hats and ob…
item.author: The Wall Street Journal (@wsj.com)
item.description:
Meet the men who have had enough of hiding under hats and obsessively monitoring hairlines.

They’re not looksmaxxing—they’re baldmaxxing. 🔗 on.wsj.com/4evg7Cl
item.content:encoded:
Meet the men who have had enough of hiding under hats and obsessively monitoring hairlines.

item.title: Vídeo bem triste do capitão do Irã falando das condições que…
item.author: Serge Katz (@sk-serge.bsky.social)
item.description: Vídeo bem triste do capitão do Irã falando das condições que estão enfrentando na Copa. Tendo que viajar entre México e Estados Unidos sem tempo pra recuperar. Sem condições para competir. Não é justo nem para ser considerado uma competição. Lamentável. Uma das maiores vergonhas da história da Fifa.
item.content:encoded: Vídeo bem triste do capitão do Irã falando das condições que estão enfrentando na Copa. Tendo que viajar entre México e Estados Unidos sem tempo pra recuperar. Sem condições para competir. Não é justo nem para ser considerado uma competição. Lamentável. Uma das maiores vergonhas da história da Fifa.

item.title: Every day, for nearly a month running, tens of thousands of …
item.author: Mother Jones (@motherjones.com)
item.description:
Every day, for nearly a month running, tens of thousands of Albanians have taken to the streets, a peaceful mass movement seeking nothing less than a complete overthrow of the government.

And it's all thanks to Jared Kushner.
item.content:encoded:
Every day, for nearly a month running, tens of thousands of Albanians have taken to the streets, a peaceful mass movement seeking nothing less than a complete overthrow of the government.

And it's all thanks to Jared Kushner.

item.title: When confronted with cancer, Connor Christou fed everything …

item.title: #Poetry #Painting #Summer It is morning, and again I am the…
item.author: Art & Nature (@capecodfairytales.bsky.social)
item.description:
#Poetry #Painting #Summer

It is morning, and again
I am the lucky person to be in it

- Mary Oliver

🎨 Kaoru Yamada
item.content:encoded:

item.title: The utterly glorious porch roof at St John the Baptist, Burf…
item.author: morrismummer (@morrismummer.bsky.social)
item.description: The utterly glorious porch roof at St John the Baptist, Burford. Anyone who uses 'medieval' as a pejorative should be made to look at this until they promise never to do it again. Photo taken lying on my back shuffling around the floor until I was happy with the framing.
item.content:encoded: The utterly glorious porch roof at St John the Baptist, Burford. Anyone who uses 'medieval' as a pejorative should be made to look at this until they promise never to do it again. Photo taken lying on my back shuffling around the floor until I was happy with the framing.

Kirakkajäuʹrr, Kirakkajärvi, Sääʹmjânnam, Lapland

item.title: HISTÓRICO! Estreante na Copa do Mundo, Cabo Verde se classif…
item.author: Tracklist (@tracklist.com.br)
item.description:
HISTÓRICO! Estreante na Copa do Mundo, Cabo Verde se classifica para a próxima fase da competição.

A seleção do goleiro Vozinha enfrenta a Argentina na próxima sexta-feira (3). #FIFAWorldCup
item.content:encoded:
HISTÓRICO! Estreante na Copa do Mundo, Cabo Verde se classifica para a próxima fase da competição.

A seleção do goleiro Vozinha enfrenta a Argentina na próxima sexta-feira (3). #FIFAWorldCup

item.title: Rescue workers retrieve a 4-year-old boy and his parents who…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: Rescue workers retrieve a 4-year-old boy and his parents who had been trapped under rubble for more than 24 hours after two massive earthquakes hit Venezuela.
item.content:encoded: Rescue workers retrieve a 4-year-old boy and his parents who had been trapped under rubble for more than 24 hours after two massive earthquakes hit Venezuela.

item.title: You know when you reach the end of a chapter and read "The d…
item.author: Glenn Evans (@vinylsol.bsky.social)
item.description: You know when you reach the end of a chapter and read "The door opened and Troy was stunned..it was Laura!"..and you're supposed to go "OMG! Laura!" but instead you start thumbing back through 200 pages muttering "who the hell's Laura??"
item.content:encoded: You know when you reach the end of a chapter and read "The door opened and Troy was stunned..it was Laura!"..and you're supposed to go "OMG! Laura!" but instead you start thumbing back through 200 pages muttering "who the hell's Laura??"

item.title: Fergie twice went to see Epstein during his prison sentence …
item.author: The Mirror (@mirror.co.uk)
item.description: Fergie twice went to see Epstein during his prison sentence for child sex offences, and a third plan to meet up fell through.
item.content:encoded: Fergie twice went to see Epstein during his prison sentence for child sex offences, and a third plan to meet up fell through.
